utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Thus 6 items are included, but one (additional_services) is missing cost details. Therefore, 6/7 items are fully specified.
